allow: PowerShell($ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 20; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - serving. Title present: $\($r.Content -match 'CrowdFlow'\)"; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500 } }; if \(-not $ok\) { "Server did not respond yet" })
